news.t: Notification on Three Victory Portfolios II ETFs

overview.description: The VictoryShares Core Plus Bond ETF (UBND) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that holds intermediate-term bonds of any type and rating that exhibit positive ESG characteristics. UBND was launched on Oct 4, 2021 and is issued by VictoryShares.

data.title: Notification on Three Victory Portfolios II ETFs
data.text: SAN ANTONIO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC (the “Exchange”) has advised Victory Portfolios II that it has determined there were less than 50 beneficial holders in the following ETFs: Vi...
